summary: Comprehensive testing of AI integration features using Claude API. Backend endpoints verified via curl. Frontend AI features (Dashboard AI Recommendations card, Minutes Draft with AI) tested via Playwright. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ai/status returns ai_enabled=true with features and models
Backend: POST /api/ai/governance-suggestions returns 4 actionable suggestions with routes
Backend: POST /api/ai/minutes-draft generates formal WHEREAS/RESOLVED minutes
Frontend: Dashboard AI Recommendations card loads and displays
Frontend: AI Recommendations shows 'Generating suggestions...' loading state
Frontend: AI Recommendations displays suggestions with titles, descriptions, points
Frontend: Refresh button visible and functional
Frontend: AI attribution text 'AI-generated suggestions' present
Frontend: Minutes page 'Draft with AI' button visible on Step 4
Frontend: Draft with AI triggers AI drafting with 'Drafting...' loading state
Frontend: AI Draft Modal appears with suggested_title, cautions, draft_body
Frontend: AI Draft Modal 'Review Before Use' cautions section displayed
Frontend: 'Insert Draft' button populates form fields with AI content
Frontend: Success toast 'AI draft inserted. Please review and edit as needed.' shown
Frontend: Summary field populated with AI-generated title
Frontend: Details field populated with 1461 chars of AI-generated minutes content
critical_code_review_comments: AI integration uses emergentintegrations library with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY - LIVE integration (NOT MOCKED)
Minutes drafting uses Claude Sonnet (claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929) for complex document generation
Governance suggestions uses Claude Haiku (claude-haiku-4-5) for quick recommendations
Frontend properly handles loading states, error states, and success states
AI Draft modal includes appropriate cautions about reviewing AI-generated content
All data-testid attributes present for reliable automated testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI integration fully tested and working. Dashboard AI Recommendations card displays AI-generated governance suggestions with loading state, refresh functionality. Minutes page Draft with AI button on Step 4 triggers Claude Sonnet to generate formal minutes with WHEREAS/RESOLVED structure. AI Draft Modal shows suggested_title, cautions (5 warnings), and draft_body. Insert Draft button populates Summary and Details fields. All endpoints require authentication.
ai_integration_status: LIVE - Using EMERGENT_LLM_KEY with Claude API (NOT MOCKED)
